name: Artificial Intelligence
summary: Developing intelligent systems that accelerate engineering, scientific discovery, and autonomous decision-making.
description: We build AI systems that act as research collaborators — reasoning over scientific knowledge, automating engineering workflows, and assisting the design and verification of complex systems. Our work spans agentic architectures, large language models, and autonomous research agents applied to real engineering and scientific problems.

name: Semiconductor Engineering
summary: Advancing next-generation semiconductor technologies through innovative engineering and automation.
description: We study the full realization path of modern chips — from RTL intent through test and packaging — with an emphasis on testability, trust, and reproducibility. Our tooling is built on open PDKs and open EDA so the entire flow can be audited and reproduced end to end.

name: Emerging Computing
summary: Exploring computational paradigms beyond conventional digital architectures.
description: Where silicon runs out, we explore what comes next. Through the Quantaris platform and related efforts we investigate hybrid, molecular, and quantum-inspired computation — building simulators, languages, and reference architectures for substrates beyond the conventional digital stack.

name: Genomics & Computational Biology
summary: Applying artificial intelligence and computational methods to biological research.
description: We apply machine learning and computational modeling to genomics and systems biology — from analyzing genomic data at scale to accelerating drug discovery and enabling precision medicine. This area connects our AI research directly to problems in the life sciences.

name: AlphaFold & Structural Biology
summary: Investigating AI-driven approaches to protein structure prediction and molecular understanding.
description: Building on the AlphaFold era of structural biology, we study AI-assisted molecular modeling and protein structure prediction, and how learned representations of biomolecules can guide protein engineering and computational biochemistry.

name: Digital Media Production & Innovation
summary: Communicating science through creative media, visual storytelling, and AI-assisted digital production.
description: Research only matters if it can be shared. Through initiatives like The Forgotten Code we turn mathematics, AI, semiconductor engineering, and physics into music, visual art, educational video, and interactive experiences that make complex ideas engaging and accessible.
